languages.text: {n}Эоганн говорит с жадным восторгом.{/n} "Поразительно! Нунциус, ты тоже это фиксируешь? Симбиоз машинных духов творений Омниссии с ксеносскими алгоритмами. Да, ересь, но какая феноменальная! Как они этого добились? Я должен постичь".

{n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн говорит с жадным восторгом.{/n} "Поразительно! Нунциус, ты тоже это фиксируешь? Симбиоз машинных духов творений Омниссии с ксеносскими алгоритмами. Да, ересь, но какая феноменальная! Как они этого добились? Я должен постичь".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn speaks, his voice trembling with fevered hunger.{/n} "Astounding! Nuntius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. Yet what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

{n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn spricht sichtlich fasziniert deutlich schneller.{/n} "Erstaunlich! Nuncius, zeichnet Ihr das ebenfalls auf? Eine Union der heiligen Maschinengeister des Omnissiah mit Xenos-Algorithmen. Ja, das ist eine üble Ketzerei. Aber sie ist auch phänomenal! Wie ist ihnen das gelungen? Ich muss ihre Geheimnisse lüften."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn spricht sichtlich fasziniert deutlich schneller.{/n} "Erstaunlich! Nuncius, zeichnet Ihr das ebenfalls auf? Eine Union der heiligen Maschinengeister des Omnissiah mit Xenos-Algorithmen. Ja, das ist eine üble Ketzerei. Aber sie ist auch phänomenal! Wie ist ihnen das gelungen? Ich muss ihre Geheimnisse lüften."

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡的声音因入迷而急促起来。{/n}“太惊人了！努恩修斯，你也在记录这个吗？居然将欧姆尼赛亚的神圣机魂与异形算法结合。没错，这是最大逆不道的异端，但也令人叹为观止！他们怎么做到的？我必须解开其中的奥秘。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡的声音因入迷而急促起来。{/n}“太惊人了！努恩修斯，你也在记录这个吗？居然将欧姆尼赛亚的神圣机魂与异形算法结合。没错，这是最大逆不道的异端，但也令人叹为观止！他们怎么做到的？我必须解开其中的奥秘。”

languages.text: {n}Fasciné, Eogunn parle à toute vitesse :{/n} « Incroyable ! Nuncius, est-ce que tu enregistres ça aussi ? Une union entre les esprits de la machine sacrés de l'Omnimessie et des algorithmes xénos. C'est un acte d'hérésie infâme, certes... mais absolument phénoménal ! Comment ont-ils fait ? Je dois percer leurs secrets. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

traits.locale_text: {n}Fasciné, Eogunn parle à toute vitesse :{/n} « Incroyable ! Nuncius, est-ce que tu enregistres ça aussi ? Une union entre les esprits de la machine sacrés de l'Omnimessie et des algorithmes xénos. C'est un acte d'hérésie infâme, certes... mais absolument phénoménal ! Comment ont-ils fait ? Je dois percer leurs secrets. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn habla con la voz atropellada por la emoción.{/n} «¡Fascinante! Nuncius, ¿tú también lo estás grabando? La unión de los sagrados espíritus máquina del Omnissiah con algoritmos xenos. Es una herejía abyecta, sin lugar a dudas. ¡Pero qué herejía tan fenomenal! ¿Cómo lo han conseguido? Debo desentrañar sus secretos».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn habla con la voz atropellada por la emoción.{/n} «¡Fascinante! Nuncius, ¿tú también lo estás grabando? La unión de los sagrados espíritus máquina del Omnissiah con algoritmos xenos. Es una herejía abyecta, sin lugar a dudas. ¡Pero qué herejía tan fenomenal! ¿Cómo lo han conseguido? Debo desentrañar sus secretos».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un sesi, büyülenmişçesine heyecanla hızlanıyor.{/n} "Şaşırtıcı! Nuncius, bunu da kaydediyor musun? Hermesih'in kutsal makine ruhları ile zeno algoritmalarının birleşimi. Evet, bu kâfirliğin en iğrenç hâli. Ama ne muazzam bir kâfirlik! Bunu nasıl başarmışlar? Sırlarını çözmeliyim."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un sesi, büyülenmişçesine heyecanla hızlanıyor.{/n} "Şaşırtıcı! Nuncius, bunu da kaydediyor musun? Hermesih'in kutsal makine ruhları ile zeno algoritmalarının birleşimi. Evet, bu kâfirliğin en iğrenç hâli. Ama ne muazzam bir kâfirlik! Bunu nasıl başarmışlar? Sırlarını çözmeliyim."

languages.text: {n}エオガンの声が、魅了されたように勢いづいた。{/n}「驚嘆すべきことです！ ヌンキウス、君もこれを記録していますか？ オムニッシアの聖なる機械精霊と、異種族のアルゴリズムとの融合。ええ、これはこの上なく忌まわしい異端です。しかし、なんという驚異的な異端でしょう！ どうやって彼らはこれを成し遂げたのか？ 私はその秘密を解き明かさねばなりません」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's voice quickens eagerly in fascination.{/n} "Astounding! Nuncius, are you recording this as well? A union of the Omnissiah's sacred machine spirits with xenos algorithms. Yes, it is heresy most foul. But what phenomenal heresy! How have they achieved this? I must unlock its secrets."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンの声が、魅了されたように勢いづいた。{/n}「驚嘆すべきことです！ ヌンキウス、君もこれを記録していますか？ オムニッシアの聖なる機械精霊と、異種族のアルゴリズムとの融合。ええ、これはこの上なく忌まわしい異端です。しかし、なんという驚異的な異端でしょう！ どうやって彼らはこれを成し遂げたのか？ 私はその秘密を解き明かさねばなりません」
